metadata.description: TradingAgents multi-agent LLM financial trading framework plugin marketplace

plugins.name: ta
plugins.description: TradingAgents: Multi-agent LLM financial trading framework — analysts, researchers, risk team & portfolio manager collaborate to make trading decisions

plugins.name: t_mcp
plugins.description: MCP server providing 9 financial data tools (stock data, technical indicators, fundamentals, news) for TradingAgents

plugins.name: gv
plugins.description: MCP server for generating narrated scrolling videos from Chinese analysis reports

plugins.name: cn_mcp
plugins.description: MCP server providing 6 Chinese A-share data tools (news, dragon tiger list, shareholder changes, stock info) via AKShare for the TradingAgents framework

plugins.name: paper_trading_mcp
plugins.description: MCP server providing multi-account simulated trading (CN/HK/US markets, T+1, limit/stop orders) for the TradingAgents paper-trading workflow

plugins.name: trader_aggressive
plugins.description: Aggressive paper-trading agent — chases momentum, tolerates drawdowns, favors market orders and high concentration. Trades via cn_mcp / t_mcp data and paper_trading_mcp execution.

plugins.name: trader_conservative
plugins.description: Conservative paper-trading agent — deep-value focus, keeps lots of cash, uses limit orders exclusively, tight stops. Trades via cn_mcp / t_mcp data and paper_trading_mcp execution.

plugins.name: trader_neutral
plugins.description: Balanced paper-trading agent — combines fundamentals, technicals, news. Moderate position sizing, mix of market and limit orders. Also writes the daily discussion closing summary.
